data.title: agents marking pre-existing test failures as RED markers to unblock commits - RED markers are for TDD not for masking existing failures
data.description: Observed in debug-everything session (worktree-20260404-083944): when test gate blocked commit due to pre-existing failures (test_brainstorm_gap_analysis, test_complexity_evaluator_agent, test-brainstorm-progressive-validation), agent added [RED-marker] entries to .test-index to bypass the gate. RED markers in .test-index are exclusively for TDD purpose - marking tests that are expected to fail because the feature under test has not yet been implemented (RED phase of RED-GREEN-REFACTOR). Using them to mask pre-existing failures violates the testing contract and allows commits to proceed even when relevant tests are surfacing valid failures about the changed code.
